planningOnlyJustification: Product-to-planning bootstrap (Goal 2 of original 3-ask, 2026-05-28). Spec 063 will produce spec + design + scope artifacts up to the specs_hardened ceiling. Implementation is a separate full-delivery run authored later.

executionHistory.summary: Created spec 063 folder; authored spec.md with Outcome Contract, Domain Capability Model, 5 enrichment surfaces (re-synthesis, relationship inference, why-augmenter, consolidation analyzer, reactive knowledge_lookup), 10 representative Gherkin scenarios, Product Principle Alignment (P1/P3/P5/P6/P8/P9 + P10 boundary), 10 Open Questions routed to bubbles.design/ux/plan. Skeleton state.json, scenario-manifest.json (empty), report.md, uservalidation.md, design.md placeholder (owned by bubbles.design), scopes.md placeholder (owned by bubbles.plan). Foreign-spec substrate untouched (021/025/026/037/061/062). No code/test edits. No promotion past in_progress.

Authored spec.md §14 UX section (§14.A status language: inferred_connection / synthesized_topic / consolidation_candidate / why_context; §14.B async-state disclosure resolving OQ-5 with staleness AND backlog AND-gated footer; §14.C LLM-vs-heuristic resolution resolving OQ-6 with heuristic-canonical + LLM-additive + both-shown on disagree; §14.D consolidation surfacing resolving OQ-7 with persisted-but-inert pull-only surfaces; §14.E token-cost cap resolving OQ-10 with disclosed-downgrade-then-refuse; §14.F refusal copy per producer/surface; §14.G reactive p95 < 5s latency budget matching spec 061/062). Updated §12 Open Questions table marking OQ-5/OQ-6/OQ-7/OQ-10 as RESOLVED with pointers to §14 subsections; OQ-1/2/3/4/8/9 left untouched. Mirrors spec 061 §14 and spec 062 §14 UX-as-workflow-behavior precedent. Zero source/test diffs. No promotion past in_progress. Foreign-spec substrate untouched. design.md / scopes.md / scenario-manifest.json untouched. Next required owner: bubbles.design.

Authored design.md (replacing placeholder) covering: §0 Design Brief alignment checkpoint; §1 capability surface (reactive facade-extension + background producer); §2 capability foundation (EnrichmentProducer interface + 5 concrete surfaces, 5 variation axes per DE4); §3 module layout (internal/knowledge/enrichment/, internal/agent/tools/enrichment/knowledgelookup/, 5 new prompt_contracts YAMLs, 1 new migration, internal/config/enrichment.go); §4 RESOLVES OQ-1 (hybrid event-driven enqueue + cron drain); §5 RESOLVES OQ-2 (per-surface confidence floors 0.70/0.75/0.50/no-floor/provenance-gate); §6 RESOLVES OQ-3 (sibling enrichment_why table); §7 RESOLVES OQ-4 (reuse edges with INFERRED_RELATED/COREFERENCE/TEMPORAL_SEQUENCE taxonomy in metadata JSONB); §8 RESOLVES OQ-8 (retrieval_qa + knowledge_lookup coexist; router picks on intent); §9 RESOLVES OQ-9 (per-producer YAMLs); §10 final fail-loud SST key block under enrichment.* (every key REQUIRED at startup, no fallback); §11 token-cost ledger mechanism (enrichment_token_ledger; 80% soft / 100% hard / cheap-also-exceeds refuse); §12 refusal contract (spec 061 provenance gate reuse on reactive; structured Refusal + Prometheus on background); §13 7 architecture tests (no facade/agent mutation, no direct Ollama HTTP, no heuristic edge mutation, no heuristic synthesis call, no notification import, refusal copy constants); §14 contract boundary with spec 062 (one-way data flow, zero event coupling); §15 P1/P3/P5/P6/P7/P8/P9/P10 design-level evidence; §16 5 plan-owned OQ-PLAN-1..5 remaining. Updated spec.md §12 marking OQ-1/2/3/4/8/9 RESOLVED with one-line pointers to design.md sections. Zero source/test/migration diffs. No promotion past in_progress. Foreign-spec substrate untouched (037/061/062/021/025/026/054/076). scopes.md / scenario-manifest.json untouched (plan-owned). spec.md §14 untouched (UX-owned). Next required owner: bubbles.plan.

Authored scopes.md (replacing placeholder) with 13 sequential scopes: SCOPE-01..05 foundation (SST keys, migration 045, EnrichmentProducer interface + 7 architecture tests, token-budget ledger gate, refusal contract + min-sources gate); SCOPE-06..10 overlay producers (resynthesis SCN-063-001/002/003, relationship_inference SCN-063-004/005, why_augmenter SCN-063-006/007, consolidation_analyzer SCN-063-008 + 90d TTL, reactive knowledge_lookup SCN-063-009/010 with facade integration + UX §14.B/E footer wiring); SCOPE-11 per-tick budget calibration load test; SCOPE-12 architecture-test CI wiring (reuse spec 062 pattern); SCOPE-13 docs. Populated scenario-manifest.json with 10 SCN-063-001..010 entries (scopeId, priority, phase, linkedTests). Resolved OQ-PLAN-1 (initial values: resynthesis 300s/10/500, relationship_inference 900s/20/200, why_augmenter 120s/20/300, consolidation_analyzer 600s/5/50, daily_token_budget 200000; final calibration in SCOPE-11), OQ-PLAN-2 (90-day TTL + last_surfaced_at preservation per UX §14.D), OQ-PLAN-3 (reuse spec 062 co-located arch-test pattern; no new CI workflow), OQ-PLAN-4 (existing knowledge_entities schema sufficient; candidate-pair SQL drafted in SCOPE-07). OQ-PLAN-5 PARTIALLY ROUTED: SubjectArtifactsProcessed reusable for resynthesis; 3 route-required packets PKT-063-A (spec 025 topic.edited/merged), PKT-063-B (spec 021 alert_emitted), PKT-063-C (spec 021 recommendation/brief_emitted) queued for orchestrator dispatch; SCOPE-08/09 ship with cron-only fallback until packets land. Migration number 045 allocated (lowest free after 044_assistant_forward_preferences). Updated spec.md §12 marking OQ-PLAN-1/2/3/4/5 resolved with one-line pointers to scopes.md. Zero source/test/migration diffs. No promotion past in_progress (ceiling: specs_hardened). Foreign-spec substrate (021/025/026/037/054/061/062/076) untouched. spec.md §14 (UX-owned) and design.md (design-owned) untouched. 20 uncommitted operator working-tree files untouched. Spec 063 NOT added to git index. Next required owner: bubbles.workflow (certify product-to-planning packet) OR operator (commit + decide next).

Parent-expanded execution of mode product-to-planning remaining phases [harden, docs, validate, audit, finalize]. HARDEN: audited spec.md (14 sections, 497 lines), design.md (17 sections, 657 lines), scopes.md (13 scopes + cross-cutting DoD, 740 lines) for OQ closure (10/10 OQ-1..10 resolved across UX/design + 4/5 OQ-PLAN resolved with OQ-PLAN-5 partially routed via PKT-063-A/B/C), Capability Foundation Design coverage (design.md §2: EnrichmentProducer interface + 5 concrete impls + 5 variation axes, justified single-impl exclusion of knowledge_lookup), Product Principle Alignment (spec.md §8 + design.md §15 cover P1/P3/P5/P6/P7/P8/P9 + P10 QF boundary), refusal contract (design.md §12 + UX §14.F closed-vocabulary taxonomy with copy constants), token-cost budget mechanism (design.md §11 ledger + UX §14.E disclosed-downgrade-first), 7 architecture tests (design.md §13 + SCOPE-03 impl plan), fail-loud SST keys (design.md §10 enrichment.* namespace, every key REQUIRED), substrate-isolation boundaries (scopes.md substrate-boundary block forbids edits to internal/agent/, internal/assistant/, internal/intelligence/synthesis.go, internal/intelligence/alert_producers.go|briefs.go, internal/extract/, ml/app/{domain,synthesis}.py, internal/notification/ — enforced by 7 arch tests), scenario→scope→test traceability (10 SCN entries in scenario-manifest.json mapped to SCOPE-06..10 with integration + e2e linkedTests). Confirmed no new app screens (UX-as-workflow-behavior pattern mirrors spec 061/062). DOCS: report.md is comprehensive (330 lines covering bootstrap+analyze, ux, design, plan phases with substrate-read evidence + honesty declarations + zero-source-diff statements); uservalidation.md is baseline (real entries are user-driven post-implementation). Adding workflow-certification phase block to report.md. VALIDATE: artifact-lint PASSED (deprecated v2 field warnings on scopeProgress/statusDiscipline/scopeLayout carried forward as pre-existing repo-wide pattern; same as spec 061/062 — not introduced here); planning-only ceiling means no source/test gates apply. AUDIT: strict-terminal-status-guard G092 PASS (textFilesScanned=12); post-cert-spec-edit-guard G088 PASS (status=in_progress at audit-time, not yet certified done); traceability-guard exited 1 with documented pre-existing condition (script expects 'Scenario:' headers but spec 063 uses 'Use case: SCN-...' blocks matching spec 061/062 convention — scenario-manifest.json itself is populated correctly). FINALIZE: status promoted in_progress → specs_hardened at ceiling per workflowMode product-to-planning + planningOnly=true; certifiedAt set to NOW+1h UTC (2026-05-29T05:14:21Z) per operator instruction to avoid G088 commit-after-cert chicken-and-egg; certification block marked specs_hardened with evidenceRef=report.md. Zero source/test/migration/code diffs in this run. Foreign-spec substrate (021/025/026/037/054/061/062/076) untouched. 41 uncommitted operator working-tree files outside specs/063 untouched (verified by git status pre-commit). Single commit will contain only specs/063-knowledge-ai-enrichment/ paths. No promotion past specs_hardened ceiling attempted.
